scripts.preprocess: node scripts/preprocess-imports.mjs && node scripts/preprocess-imports-hs4.mjs && node scripts/preprocess-auto-parts-imports.mjs && node scripts/preprocess-electronics-imports.mjs && node scripts/preprocess-textiles-imports.mjs && node scripts/preprocess-gems-and-jewellery-imports.mjs && node scripts/preprocess-exports.mjs && node scripts/preprocess-exports-hs4.mjs && node scripts/preprocess-seafood-imports.mjs && node scripts/preprocess-exports-hs8.mjs
scripts.build: npm run preprocess && tsc --noEmit && vite build
